  • 💛 Choose Your Impact

START Your First 90 Days Beyond BARS TODAY!

I guide system-impacted women in transition from incarceration, rehab, or group homes through a 90-day reentry journey and beyond!

✨ All BIPOC, LGBTQIA+ communities are welcome! ✨

Step 1

Fill Out the Registration Form

Start here by completing the registration form so we can learn about your goals and get you connected to the right support.

Click to Register Today!
Step 2

Join the Skool Community

Watch your inbox for your invitation to an alcohol-free community for system-impacted women choosing sobriety, nervous-system safety, movement, + real connection—online + IRL.

Join The Sober Rebel Club on Skool!

🗺️ Your Beyond BARS Roadmap

🚦
Step 1

First 90-Days Beyond BARS

START HERE!

Click Here to Register!
🛞
Step 2

First 6-Months Beyond BARS

Prerequisite: First 90 Days Beyond BARS

Gain Traction!

🥁
Step 3

First 9-Months Beyond BARS

Prerequisites: First 90 Days → First 6 Months

Finding Your Rhythm

🤹‍♀️
Step 4

First Year Beyond BARS

Prerequisites: All previous steps

Put It All Together!

Supporting alcohol-free women in rebuilding safety, self-trust, and stability.

🏡 Beyond BARS Coaching, 501(c)(3), #33-1514564
